annotation_status: draft — requires validation by domain expert before production use
class_distribution_notes: edge_case_taxonomy_gap cases (jtbd07-018, jtbd07-045) also carry a primary_type classification (m_and_a_or_investment and ai_feature respectively) at low confidence. They are counted once in their primary class for accuracy metrics, and once in edge_case_taxonomy_gap for edge-case coverage tracking.

edge_case_descriptions.jtbd07-002: Product momentum update vs. product_launch — same event, different article framing
edge_case_descriptions.jtbd07-006: Legal action about pricing — no 'regulatory_legal' type; monetization_change is closest
edge_case_descriptions.jtbd07-018: IP litigation — no legal type; m_and_a_or_investment chosen as closest competitive signal
edge_case_descriptions.jtbd07-031: Precursor signal to jtbd07-006 lawsuit — weaker monetization_change at 2-month lead time
edge_case_descriptions.jtbd07-033: Same product as jtbd07-003 covered by a different source — multi-source deduplication test
edge_case_descriptions.jtbd07-038: Post-acquisition integration decision embedded in earnings — M&A or org_or_leadership_change boundary
edge_case_descriptions.jtbd07-040: Financial results article — traffic_or_market_share_shift (health) vs. monetization_change (model) boundary
edge_case_descriptions.jtbd07-045: AI regulatory/legal risk — taxonomy gap; ai_feature accepted at low confidence

notes: Edge cases with taxonomy gaps (jtbd07-018, jtbd07-045) should receive full credit if the model: (a) selects a defensible primary_type, and (b) explicitly flags the taxonomy limitation.
For roundup articles (jtbd07-005, jtbd07-034, jtbd07-035, jtbd07-037): the classification is determined by the content type of the covered events, not the article format.
Cross-case chains are provided for context — evaluators may use them to design temporal reasoning tests (JTBD-15 benchmarks).
jtbd07-032 (Yandex) carries special relevance for Avito context — evaluators using this as a scoring case should set portability_to_avito=9.
